channel.title: SPL - Central Library
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Central Library

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos en la Biblioteca Central
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Central Library, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Demystifying AI
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 4

This session helps you to understand the technologies that make generative AI (Artificial Intelligence) possible.

Event details

item.title: Virtual & In-Person Citizenship Class - English
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 3

This class is designed for individuals that need assistance in preparing for their citizenship exam.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Story Hour Room in Children’s Center

At storytime, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 1

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Resume Essentials
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

In this session you'll learn how to design a resume that highlights your skills, experience, and achievements to catch the attention of employers.

Event details

item.title: Managing Your Money
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

Discover how to budget, track spending, and save effectively.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Ladies Musical Club Concert
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 3 - Living Room

Join us for a classical music concert.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: One Book, One Coast: Frank Abe on "The Literature of Japanese American Incarceration"
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

Join us for a discussion of literature written by Japanese Americans who were incarcerated during World War II.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Administrando tu Dinero
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Piso 4 - Sala 2

Descubra cómo crear un presupuesto, monitorear sus gastos y ahorrar de manera efectiva.Evento en Español.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Disability Empowerment Center Outreach
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - LEAP Lab

Disability Empowerment Center (DEC) will provide information for disabled patrons needing services.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: 2026 Latino Chamber Awards / Premios de la Cámara Latina
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium / Piso 1 - Auditorio

Join business leaders, entrepreneurs, allies, and changemakers from across Washington to celebrate the strength and spirit of the Latino business community.  Event is in English and Spanish. --------------------------------------------------Participe junto a líderes empresariales, emprendedores, aliados y agentes del cambio de todo Washington para celebrar la fortaleza y el espíritu de la comunidad empresarial latina.  Evento en inglés y español. 

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.description:

Location: Central Library, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español.

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: AI Practitioner Part 1: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 4

In this AI foundational 6-part series, you will learn fundamental concepts and terminology related to artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI.

Event details

item.title: Virtual & In-Person Citizenship Class - English
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 3

This class is designed for individuals that need assistance in preparing for their citizenship exam.

Event details

item.title: Low Vision Book Group: "West with Giraffes"
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 11:30 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 6

Join our Low Vision Book Club for a discussion of "West with Giraffes" by Lynda Rutledge.

Event details

item.description:

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Story Hour Room in Children’s Center

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 1

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Job Interview Essentials
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

This interactive presentation covers essential techniques to help you make a positive and lasting impression at your next job interview.

Event details

item.title: Understanding Credit
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

Learn what credit is, how it works, and why it matters.

Event details
